sub_goals.sub_goal: Build the store data lookup module: query OSM Overpass API for shop=alcohol/wine/beverages within an around-radius, normalize records, handle failure/timeout/empty gracefully.

acceptance_verification.evidence: findNearbyLiquorStores POSTs to OVERPASS_ENDPOINT and returns normalized real store records on status 'ok'.
normalizeElement always emits {name,address,lat,lon}; placeholders 'Unnamed liquor store' / 'Address not listed' substituted, never omitted.
buildOverpassQuery emits node/way/relation["shop"="alcohol"](around:<radius>,<lat>,<lon>) — shop=alcohol tag plus around filter bound to the coordinate.
fetchWithTimeout + .catch returns status:'error' with a human-readable message for offline/timeout/HTTP error; HTTP non-2xx throws into the same catch; promise never rejects.
Zero normalized stores returns status:'empty'; radiusMeters is a parameter so the caller can re-call with a larger radius.

contract_verification.evidence: Returns {status,stores,message}; each store {name,address,lat,lon}; no distance/ranking logic.
findNearbyLiquorStores returns a Promise resolving to {status,stores,message}; never throws; one query per call; shell owns retry policy.
Consumes only lat/lon; performs no geolocation or geocoding.
